allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "python --version && python -c \\"import pptx, lxml, PIL; print\('all OK'\)\\"")
Bash(powershell.exe -NonInteractive -Command "Set-Location 'C:\\Side project\\ppt generator'; \\$result = & python test_env.py 2>&1; \\$result | Out-String" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -NonInteractive -Command "
Set-Location 'C:\\Side project\\ppt generator'
python test_env.py 2>'C:\\Side project\\ppt generator\\err.txt' | Out-File -FilePath 'C:\\Side project\\ppt generator\\out.txt'
Get-Content 'C:\\Side project\\ppt generator\\out.txt'
Get-Content 'C:\\Side project\\ppt generator\\err.txt'
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -NonInteractive -Command "
\\$pinfo = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
\\$pinfo.FileName = 'python'
\\$pinfo.RedirectStandardError = \\$true
\\$pinfo.RedirectStandardOutput = \\$true
\\$pinfo.UseShellExecute = \\$false
\\$pinfo.Arguments = 'C:\\`\\`Side project\\`\\`ppt generator\\`\\`test_env.py'
\\$pinfo.WorkingDirectory = 'C:\\Side project\\ppt generator'
\\$p = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process
\\$p.StartInfo = \\$pinfo
\\$p.Start\(\) | Out-Null
\\$stdout = \\$p.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd\(\)
\\$stderr = \\$p.StandardError.ReadToEnd\(\)
\\$p.WaitForExit\(\)
Write-Output 'STDOUT:'
Write-Output \\$stdout
Write-Output 'STDERR:'
Write-Output \\$stderr
Write-Output \('EXIT: ' + \\$p.ExitCode\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -NonInteractive -Command "
Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
\\$pyPaths = @\(
    'C:\\Python311\\python.exe',
    'C:\\Python312\\python.exe',
    'C:\\Python310\\python.exe',
    'C:\\Users\\imake\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python311\\python.exe',
    'C:\\Users\\imake\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python312\\python.exe',
    'C:\\Users\\imake\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python310\\python.exe',
    'C:\\Users\\imake\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\python3.exe',
    'C:\\Users\\imake\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\python.exe'
\)
foreach \(\\$path in \\$pyPaths\) {
    if \(Test-Path \\$path\) { Write-Output \\"FOUND: \\$path\\" }
}
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -NonInteractive -Command "
\\$pinfo = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
\\$pinfo.FileName = 'C:\\Users\\imake\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python313\\python.exe'
\\$pinfo.RedirectStandardError = \\$true

\\$p = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process

Bash(powershell.exe -NonInteractive -Command "
\\$py = 'C:\\Users\\imake\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python313\\python.exe'
\\$cwd = 'C:\\Side project\\ppt generator'

\\$pinfo.Arguments = 'run_build3.py'

" 2>&1)
